name: Orchard Pass #0006
description: Genesis Pass 6 of 10 — proof of operation for a Tree in The Orchard, an open-source environmental DePIN on Chia. Holder operates one of the first 10 Trees in the network.

attributes.value:
Founding credentials for The Orchard
An open-source environmental DePIN on the Chia blockchain. 
Each Pass is the on-chain identity of a Tree (ESP32-class sensing node). 
Holders operate the first Trees in the network, collecting verifiable environmental data and earning $JUICE for verified Season uptime. 
Ten Passes in the genesis batch. 
The orchard will continue to grow with the network.
